reason: Frontend spec index — entry point listing all frontend conventions used by this task.
Feature-first layout rules; this task seeds web/src/{app,features,shared,tests} for the new frontend package.
Component composition rules for stateful workflows (BLOCKED / NEEDS_CLARIFICATION / PARTIAL_SUCCESS branches), confirmation UI separation, masking conventions.
Domain hook naming and shape (use-task-plan-preview, use-task-execution-status, use-can-* permission hooks, polling-stop-on-terminal rule).
Server / URL / local / global / sensitive-temporary state boundaries; this task defines TanStack Query keys, URL state for filters, ActorContext as the only global store.
Discriminated union for TaskExecutionViewState, branded ID aliases, runtime zod validation at API boundary, forbidden any rules.
Forbidden / required UI patterns, minimum component / integration test assertions for blocked / clarification / partial-success / sensitive-display cases.
Frontend mirrors backend zod contracts; this task introduces the contracts-mirror policy and needs cross-layer consistency guidance.
Shared components (StatusBadge, ConfirmationDialog) and shared hooks must follow reuse rules to avoid duplicating task-state literals across features.
Platform-level PRD authoritative for permission points, lifecycle states, YOLO / confirmation rules, and asset discovery states.
Parent MVP PRD defining wave order and global constraints (frontend stack, scope boundaries between sibling frontend tasks).
This task's own PRD with workspace layout, stack decisions, MSW surface, hook list, and acceptance criteria.
Source of truth for taskState, taskLifecycleStage indirectly, executionIntensity, assetDiscoveryState, permissionPoint, domainErrorCode enums; web/src/shared/contracts mirrors these zod schemas.
API error response shape that MSW handlers must emit and the fetch helper must parse before throwing typed errors.
ActorContext shape consumed by /api/auth/session mock and the React ActorProvider.
Asset target / asset group authorization shapes for /api/asset-groups handlers and the asset-scope feature.
Discovered asset shape and DISCOVERED_PENDING_CONFIRMATION / CONFIRMED / REJECTED / OUT_OF_SCOPE_DISCOVERED transitions for the discovered-assets queue page.
WorkflowType, TaskPlanStep, CreateTaskCommand schemas — task-console plan preview and POST /api/tasks payload mirror these.
TaskRecord, taskLifecycleStage, taskClarification, taskConfirmation, taskStepResult — backbone for task-detail page and TaskExecutionViewState discriminated union.
